New: Connect a supported AI assistant by copying one connection URL from WordPress.
Approve each AI assistant in WordPress before it can access your site.
See connected AI assistants and disconnect them whenever needed.
Choose which abilities your AI assistant can use after it is connected.
Improved: Setup instructions now focus on the steps users need, not technical details.
Copy buttons make connection details easier to use.
The About page now explains Quark in plain language.
WordPress notices now appear below the Quark header so the page is easier to read.
AI assistant connections now work more reliably.
Quark can now help with comments, media, site information, plugins, and themes.
Reliability: Added extra checks to catch problems before test releases are shared.
Added connection checks to reduce setup issues.
Prepared release downloads so they include only the files users need.
Added clear privacy and external service notes for WordPress users.
